# modules — llms.txt

> 152 Dashboard-Module des DEVKiTZ™ Oekosystems. Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS.
> Entry-Point: C:\DEVKiTZ\llms.txt
> Dashboard: C:\DEVKiTZ\01_PROJECTS\01_dashboard\llms.txt

## Module (A-Z)

| Modul | Beschreibung |
|:------|:-------------|
| action-builder/ | Action Builder — Aktionen zusammenstellen und automatisieren |
| agent-builder/ | Agent Builder — BMAD Agenten erstellen und konfigurieren |
| agent-control-panel/ | Agent Control Panel — Live-Steuerung aller Agenten |
| ai_chat/ | AI Chat — Multi-Provider KI-Chat Interface |
| aiaikirk/ | AIAIKirk — KI-Plattform Dashboard |
| analyser/ | Analyser — Module pruefen, debuggen, dokumentieren, strukturieren |
| api-tester/ | API Tester — REST/GraphQL API Testing Tool |
| app-builder/ | App Builder — Web-Applikationen zusammenbauen |
| appscript-builder/ | AppScript Builder — Google Apps Script Generator |
| ascii-tool/ | ASCII Tool — ASCII Art Generator und Converter |
| awesome-design-stitch/ | Awesome Design Stitch — Stitch Design System Showcase |
| awesome-design-vanilla/ | Awesome Design Vanilla — Vanilla CSS Design Sammlung |
| base64-tools/ | Base64 Tools — Encode/Decode fuer Text und Dateien |
| black8-builder/ | Black8 Builder — Template Builder |
| blog-commander/ | Blog Commander — Blog-Verwaltung und Publishing |

| blog-gallery/ | Blog Gallery — Blog Bild-Galerie |
| bookmark-manager/ | Bookmark Manager — Lesezeichen organisieren |

| changelog-builder/ | Changelog Builder — Release Notes aus Git-Commits generieren |
